overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game. An armored character navigates a dimly lit industrial corridor with metal storage racks and piping, then interacts with a control panel to manipulate a large bulkhead door mechanism. The environment features greenish artificial lighting with red emergency indicator lights creating a tense atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with storage racks

events.description: character slows and stops at the control panel near the bulkhead door

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor toward the bulkhead door control station

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with orange storage containers
rectangular metal ventilation grille mounted on the concrete wall
industrial control box with glowing red indicator lights and lever mechanism
large circular metal airlock door with heavy locking mechanism
yellow painted metal safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor lined with metal storage racks on the left and a yellow safety railing on the right. The path leads toward a large circular bulkhead door with an illuminated control panel featuring red emergency lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: airlock control station with manual lever mechanism

events.description: character engages the control lever, pulling it down to activate the bulkhead door mechanism
character releases the lever and steps back from the control panel

agents.ego_description: grasping and pulling the red control lever with right hand to engage the door mechanism, then stepping back to observe

segments.scene_description: The camera focuses on the control panel as the character manipulates the red-lit lever mechanism. The metal storage racks disappear from view as the camera closes in. After pulling the lever, the character steps back, revealing the large bulkhead door positioned to the right of the control station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial corridor that culminates in the operation of a heavy bulkhead mechanism. It begins by tracking the character past metal storage racks and a yellow safety railing, moving steadily toward a circular door flanked by an illuminated control panel. As the character reaches the station, the camera closes in on the red-lit lever mechanism, causing the surrounding corridor and racks to fade from view. The scene then shifts focus as the lever is pulled, before the camera pulls back to reveal the massive bulkhead door standing to the right of the control station.
